title: Google Calendar

venue.title: Venue calendar
venue.description: Sync a master Google Calendar for the venue. Events on that calendar will block availability for every reservation at this venue.

personal.title: My Google Calendar
personal.description: Connect your personal Google Calendar. Events on your calendar will block your staff availability across every venue where you work.

differentFromBusiness: This is independent of Google Business Profile. No business verification required — a standard Google account works.

picker.title: Choose the calendar you want to sync
picker.description: We only show calendars where you have enough permissions.
picker.noWritable: No writable calendars found. For staff reservations you need a calendar you own or have write access to.
picker.invalidSession: The session expired. Please start the connection again.

toast.connectFailed: Couldn't connect Google Calendar. Please try again.
toast.connectionFinalized: Pick the calendar you want to sync.

disconnect.confirmDescription: Events from that calendar will stop blocking availability. Existing reservations aren't affected.

reservationBusyError: This time slot is blocked by an event on the connected calendar. Pick a different time.
